diagrams.title: Capacity Planning Decision Framework
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchy of capacity planning decisions from strategic to operational levels
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the systematic approach to capacity planning decisions

diagrams.title: Vertical vs Horizontal Scaling Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of scale-up (vertical) and scale-out (horizontal) approaches
elements: Horizontal: More servers → Load balancer distribution
diagrams.purpose: Clarifying different scaling methodologies and their applications

diagrams.title: Cloud Deployment Models Spectrum
diagrams.description: Shows progression from traditional on-premises to various cloud deployment models
diagrams.purpose: Understanding different cloud deployment options and their trade-offs

diagrams.title: Capacity Planning Process Cycle
diagrams.description: Continuous cycle showing iterative capacity management process
elements: Monitor → Analyze → Plan → Implement → Review → Back to Monitor
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the ongoing nature of capacity planning
